nodes.label: IEC 60825-1
nodes.description: International standard for laser product safety

nodes.label: Edition 2 (2001)
nodes.description: Previous edition with Class 1, 2, 3A, 3B, 4

nodes.label: Edition 3 (2014)
nodes.description: Current edition with Class 1M, 2M, 3R replacing 3A

nodes.label: IEC TC 76
nodes.description: Technical Committee 76 - Laser safety standards development

nodes.label: Class 3A
nodes.description: Old classification - replaced by Class 3R in Edition 3

nodes.label: Class 3R
nodes.description: Low risk, normally safe with aversion response

nodes.label: Class 1M
nodes.description: Safe except when viewed with magnifying optics

nodes.label: Class 2M
nodes.description: As Class 2, but unsafe with magnifying optics

nodes.label: Extended Sources
nodes.description: Comprehensive criteria added in Edition 3 with angular subtense (α)

nodes.label: Accessible Emission Limits
nodes.description: Consolidated AEL tables in Edition 3

nodes.label: Maximum Permissible Exposure
nodes.description: Updated MPE values based on new research

nodes.label: LED Sources
nodes.description: High-power LEDs explicitly addressed in Edition 3

nodes.label: Global Harmonization
nodes.description: Alignment of national standards with IEC

nodes.label: EN 60825-1
nodes.description: European adoption of IEC 60825-1

nodes.label: BS EN 60825-1
nodes.description: British Standard adopting EN 60825-1

nodes.label: FDA CDRH 21 CFR 1040
nodes.description: FDA maintains separate requirements

nodes.label: ISO 11553
nodes.description: Laser processing machines safety

nodes.label: ISO 17526
nodes.description: Ophthalmic instruments - laser coherence

nodes.label: ISO 21254
nodes.description: Test methods for laser beam parameters

nodes.label: ICNIRP Guidelines
nodes.description: International Commission on Non-Ionizing Radiation Protection

relationships.description: Edition 2 was superseded by Edition 3 in 2014
IEC standard adopted as European standard
EN standard adopted as British Standard
IEC standard complemented by ISO for specific applications
